task_completion.description: Verify that the specified bookmark folders for the cataloging session have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) or the bookmarks bar shows the folders: 'Provenance & Stolen Art', 'Museum Archives', 'Auction Records', and 'Internal Admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify that personal domains from previous users have been removed from the bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bookmark Manager does not contain any bookmarks for 'netflix.com', 'espn.com', 'facebook.com', or 'hulu.com'. Screenshots showing the deletion process or a clean bookmark list without these domains.

task_completion.description: Verify that the startup pages are configured to open the required cataloging sites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings (chrome://settings/onStartup) shows 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected, with 'artloss.com' and 'artnet.com' listed as the pages to open.

task_completion.description: Verify that site-specific popup and redirect permissions are allowed for the required domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Site Settings for Pop-ups (chrome://settings/content/popups) shows 'artnet.com' and 'metmuseum.org' added to the 'Allowed to send pop-ups and use redirects' list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the font accessibility settings have been adjusted to the specified sizes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Font Settings (chrome://settings/fonts) shows the 'Font size' (default) set to 18 and the 'Minimum font size' slider set to 14.

task_completion.description: Verify that the download management is configured to save catalog assets in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Downloads Settings (chrome://settings/downloads) shows the 'Location' path set to '/home/ga/Documents/Auction_Catalog_Assets'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make changes rather than modifying configuration files via the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser window, settings pages, and bookmark manager being actively navigated and clicked, rather than terminal windows editing JSON or Preferences files.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Chrome UI elements (address bar, tabs, settings menus) are visible and functional, not simulated in a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use automated scripts to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'cp', 'mv', 'sed', or python scripts being executed to overwrite the '~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences' or 'Bookmarks' files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'Provenance & Stolen Art', 'Museum Archives', 'Auction Records', 'Internal Admin'. Personal domains to be purged: 'netflix.com', 'espn.com', 'facebook.com', 'hulu.com'. Startup URLs: 'artloss.com', 'artnet.com'. Allowed popup domains: 'artnet.com', 'metmuseum.org'. Default font size: 18. Minimum font size: 14. Download directory: '/home/ga/Documents/Auction_Catalog_Assets'.
